summary: Error handling module with 50 known error codes and LaunchdeckError class

findings.summary: Error handling module with 50 known error codes and LaunchdeckError class
notes: 50 unique error codes covering config, registry, runtime, task execution, port conflicts, locks, clean operations, agents, and internal errors
13 error code aliases mapping legacy/internal codes to contract codes
LaunchdeckError extends Error with code and optional details properties
toContractErrorCode resolves aliases, falls back to 'internal_error' for unknown codes
toContractErrorPayload is a thin wrapper around toErrorPayload with contractCode: true
